title: What year was iPhone 1 released? : r/MandelaEffect - Reddit
content: The first iPhone was unveiled in January of 2007, but released in June of 2007. Maybe you worked an event for Apple in summer of 2007?

title: The History of Apple iPhones
content: - Apple iPhone 17 Pro Max. In 2021, Apple unveiled the iPhone 13, iPhone 13 Pro, iPhone 13 Pro Max, and iPhone 13 mini, which gave users their best iPhone experience yet…until 2022 when they revealed iPhone 14, iPhone 14 Pro, iPhone 14 Pro Max and iPhone 14 Plus. In 2023, Apple introduced the iPhone 15, iPhone 15 Plus, iPhone 15 Pro, and the iPhone 15 Pro Max. This lineup has many new improvements such as Dynamic Island, USB-C, and a brand new action button to name a few. The past models set us up for the most recent series, the iPhone 17, iPhone 17 Pro, iPhone 17 Pro Max and the iPhone Air (this being the first of its kind and the thinnest iPhone yet). Released in September 2025, iPhone 17 series gave us an even newer processor: the A19 chip, faster charging and significantly improved cameras with higher megapixels and advanced zoom on the Pro Max. The iPhone has come a very long way over the past 18 years from the first iPhone that was released in 2007.
